2024.notes: MHJ arrived Kyler & MHJ struggled to find connection. McBride top 3 TE & established himself as the ELITE weapon but could not score TD with Murray at QB. Murray healthy. Offense clicked second half. But very dissapointing season

2025.notes: MHJ showed flashes of being a true WR1. McBride locked in as top TE. Pass-heavy scheme when Kyler Murray was hurt and soft benched the rest of the season. James Conner & Trey Benson suffered season ending injuries. Michael Wilson Broke out with Jacoby Brissett at QB. Kyler Murray injured and lost his starting job.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 19th in pass pro overall (down 10 spots in 2024. 20th in run blocking overall (down 15 spots from 2024). 3rd most sacks allowed in NFL (59).
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Marginally improved. Isaac Seumelo starting LG. Paris Johnson Jr. enters year 3 & can become star LT. Chase Bisontis 2nd round G could compete for starting RB spot. Best case: average O line. Worst case: Bottom of the league again.
2026.key_departures: Kyler Murray was cut & signed with Minnesota. WR3 Greg Dortch left to Detroit. RB4 Emari Demercado left in free agency.
2026.key_adds: Jeremiyah Love (Notre Dame) RB drafted 1st round 3rd overall. drafted guard Chase Bisontis 2nd round (Texas A&M). Drafed Carson Beck QB Miami 3rd round. Drafted WR Reggie Virgil (Texas Tech) 5th round. Signed G Issac Seumalo to 3/$31M (starting O line). Signed Tyler Allgeier ATL RB to 2 year $12.25M deal. Signed Kendrick Bourne 2/$10M deal. Signed QB Gardner Minshew II 1/$8M. Signed Devin Duvernay WR on 1 year (kick returner most likely).
2026.offensive_outlook: The offense SHOULD be improved compared to last season. Jeremiyah Love is a dynamic back that COULD elevate the run game signifcantly. Rushing offense for Arizona was 31st in the NFL in 2025 (93.1 YPG) & Passing offense was 7th with 232 YPG. Total offense was 19th. Arizona passing offense was so high in 2025 because they were always losing. If the run game can succeed, the offense will improve greatly. Mike LaFleur is a talented young coach and a great hire by Arizona especially compared to the previous coaching staff.
2026.dynasty_implications: The Cardinals have interesting pieces on their offense but the offensive line and lack of a franchise QB is holding them back. IF Arizona can figure out the QB position, player value across the board SHOULD explode (Mcbride already ballin). Jeremiyah Love COULD have a slower start in 2026 but is a candidate to have a top 10 PPR fantasy season 100%.
2026.notes: Love arrives as 1.03 pick — immediate RB1 candidate. Mike LaFleur hired as new HC (Shanahan & McVay tree). OC is Nathaniel Hackett. Arizona signed Tyler Allgeier from Atlanta, will compete with James Conner for Backup. Expect Trey Benson COULD be traded or compete for backup. Cardinals drafted Carson Beck Round 3 of 2026 draft & MAY compete with Brissett who is looking for a new contract. Brissett likely week 1 starter. Michael Wilson MAY establish himself as a TRUE WR2 in 2026 (Trending in right direction). MHJ WR1 breakout candidate, but has yet to demonstrate consistency. If the O line does not improve, Jeremiyah Love will have a difficult rookie season similar to Ashton Jeanty in Las Vegas. Arizona will need better QB play for any players to have consistent weekly fantasy upside in 2026. It is possible Brissett can continue to support volume for McBride, but one of Michael Wilson or MHJ will have to benefit. Both cannot have high finishes most likely.

2024.notes: Cousins torn achilles hurt dynasty production. Michael Penix Jr. mediocre 5 games after Cousins injury. Bijan great. London consistent, QB play limited breakout. Pitts still disappointing.

2025.notes: Penix takes over, offense increases, but Penix has some struggles. Penix tears ACL & Kirk Cousins becomes QB1. Young mobile QB could unlock London and scheme. Bijan elite. Pitts late season breakout earns franchise tag from Atlanta. Mooney very dissapointing.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 12th overall pass blocking (Down 2 spots from 2024). 16th overall run blocking (down 9 spots from 2024).
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Drew Dalman (starting Center) left to Chicago Bears & RT Kaleb McGary retired aftr missing entire 2025 season. Elijah Wilkinson Starting RT left in free agency. But signed Chiefs veteran Tackle Jawaan Taylor. Can project similar offensive protection. Average pass protection and slightly above average run blocing.
2026.key_departures: Drew Dalman (starting Center) left to Chicago Bears & RT Kaleb McGary retired aftr missing entire 2025 season. Elijah Wilkinson Starting RT left in free agency. Kirk Cousins left to Las Vegas. Tyler Allgeier left to Arizona. WR Darnell Mooney released after regression & heads to NY Giants.
2026.key_adds: Tua Tagovailoa signed on 1 year veteran minumum deal. WR Jahan Dotson 2 year $15M deal. TE Austin Hooper 1 year deal to back up Pitts. WR Olamide Zaccheaus returns to ATL. OL Jawaan Taylor signed 1 year deal. Zachariah Branch WR Georgia 3rd Round draft pick.
2026.offensive_outlook: 2025 14th total offense per game (333 YPG), 24th in scoring ofense, 8th in rushing offense, 19th in passing offense. If Stafanski can elevate QB play, offense should be average passing & above average rushing. With offensive line departures, run game may decline slightly. But worst case is average. IF QB play is bad, could be a below average passing attack.
2026.dynasty_implications: Bijan Robinson has been able to produce redardless of poor QB play in ATL. Drake London has had flashes & the talent is clearly there, but needs better QB play. Perhaps Penix Jr fully recovers from 2nd ACL tear & proves he is the franchise QB. OR there is a SMALL chance Tua turns his career around and can elevate this offense. Unlikely. Despite what most fans think, the falcons have not committed to a starting QB, there is a decent chance their franchise QB is neither Penix or Tua.
2026.notes: Falcons signed Tua Tagovailoa after release from Dolphins. Penix may be ready week 1 but possible he is no longer the starter. This will be determined in camp. New HC: Kevin Stefanski from Browns. Tommy Rees is new OC. Followed Stefanski from Cleveland. Bijan & London are core offensive players. Pitts wants long term exension, but was franchise tagged (could be traded). Branch round 3 Georgia WR adds speed & could produce early. Brian Robinson Jr is a valuable handcuff for Bijan Robinson but shouldn't have stand alone value. London clear WR1, Zaccheaus returns in free agency. Jahan Dotson (former 1st round pick) added in free agency. Zachariah Branch could see large volume as a rookie if develops quickly. QB play may still hold team back. Olamide Zaccheaus is a player that should be rostered in all leagues as a real sleeper. Highly productive player in Chicago that COULD pop early if Branch is a slow bloomer & Dotson is a nothing burger.

2024.notes: Henry 1,900 yards absurd. Signed Henry in free agency & significantly boosted offense. Lamar Ridiculous 4172 passing yards, 41TD, 4 INT. Flowers steady. Lamar MVP again. Likely sneaky TE2 value. Flowers breakout but not true WR1. Bateman produced as solid deep threat. WR play still not elite. Mark Andrews struggled to produce with Likely playing well.

2025.notes: Lamar injured most of season. Played through injury. Tyler Huntley struggled as back up. Derrick Henry declined still posted 1595 rushing yards despite brutal team performance. Flowers ascending. Andrews declining. Lamar still elite SF value. Likely struggled to produce with offense struggles.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 29th overall in pass pro (down 22 spots from 2024). 2nd overall run blocking (up 1 spot from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: The Ravens O Line struggled significantly in pass pro last year. Now, they lose C Tyler Linderbaum in free agency to the Raiders. But They added G John Simpson on a 3/$30M. Drafted G Olaivavega Ioane from Penn State RD 1 (HUGE BOOST). They add C Danny Pinter on a 1 year deal as well (mid). Overall the pass pro should be improved but doubt it will be a top 5 run blocking o line without Linderbaum.
2026.key_departures: Biggest departure is HC John Harbaugh being fired at the end of the 2025 season. C Tyler Linderbaum left to Raiders. Isaiah Likely (TE) signed 3 year deal with NY. Lost RB Keaton Mitchell to the Chargers.
2026.key_adds: G John Simpson (3/$30M), TE Durham Smythe (depth), QB Tyler Huntley (Back up to Lamar), WR Ja'Kobi Lane (3rd round from USC), WR Elijah Sarratt (4th Round Indiana), TE Matthew Hibner TE (5th round SMU)
2026.offensive_outlook: Offense looks to get back to their 2024 form. Lamar's injuries in 2025 held the offense back. Flowers was capped, Derrick Henry was not as effective as normal (Ravens were not winning & were not up so didnt run as much). If Lamar can stay healthy over the next few years this is an offense we want to target. RB Adam Randall from Clemson 5th round draft pick.
2026.dynasty_implications: Derrick Henry is aging, but until proven otherwise, will continue to be the Ravens workhorse back. Zay Flowers had his 5th year option picked up & his long term future in Baltimore MAY hinge on his 2026 season. he has shown flashes of being a true WR1, and Baltimore hasn't brought in direct competition with him, but imagine if he doesn't establish himself this year that Ravens will address WR more adequately. Rookie WRS Lane & Sarratt. have a large opportunity to take a substantial role in this offense. Bateman and Walker by no means are locked in as WR2 and WR3.
2026.notes: Lamar expected to completely bounce back. Derrick Henry is the unicorn who never ages apparently (fall off coming but production still here as of now). Ravens draft Adam Randall RB in 5th round. Justice Hill will still operate as 3rd down back. Henry main back. Isaiah Likely left to Giants in free agency. Andrews signs extension. Durham Smythe TE & Matthew Hibner TE also drafted. Andrews should be TE1 but unsure what production will look like. Ravens picked up Flowers franchise tag and he is under contract through 2027. Lane could be a rookie breakout, opportunity is 100% there.

2024.notes: Diggs traded. Bills trade for Amari Cooper & he is solid. Shakir consistent. Cook maintained value. Allen still top SF asset. Coleman STRUGGLES with off field & lockerroom issues. Decently productive.

2025.notes: Keon Coleman looks like a complete bust. Multiple Healthy scratches because he showed up late to team meetings. Shakir reliable slot. Cook great value & very underrated. Allen locked as SF1 for years. Shakir was only reliable reciever. Kincaid struggled to stay Healthy & Knox is not consistent. Serious lack of production from pass catchers. Mainly Josh Allen & James Cook show in Buffalo this season. James Cook landed contract extension this offseason.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 13th overall in pass blocking (down 2 spots from 2024) & 3rd overall run blocking (up 11 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Bills added IOL Ausin Corbett from Panthers this offseason (solid OL & projected starter), Lloyd Cushenberry (C) veteran, and lost LG David Edwards & Tackle Ryan Van Demark. The BIGGEST KEY, bills resigned G Connor McGovern & Key back up Alec Anderson. The line is considered to be improved heading into 2026 & should be a top 10 line across the board
2026.key_departures: David Edwards (starting LG), WR Curtis Samuel was released. Back up QB Mitch Trubisky signed with the Titans.
2026.key_adds: Bills traded a 2nd round pick for to Bears for WR DJ Moore & extended on 4 year deal. C Lloyd Cushenberry 1 year deal. G/C Austin Corbett from Panthers (starter). WR Trent Sherfield from Minnesota (depth).
2026.offensive_outlook: The Bills roster remains very similar to 2025 but they add DJ Moore & promote Joe Brady to OC. Josh Allen's passing game should recieve a major boost. DJ Moore is expected to be the established WR1 on the Bills for the foreseable future. This should be a top 5 offense in the NFL barring an injury to Josh Allen.
2026.dynasty_implications: This is a high powered offense centered around Josh Allen & James Cook. Over the past few years, the Bills have struggled to surround Allen with the weapons he needs in the passsing game. Kincaid HAS NOT made the leap or returned his 1st round draft capital despite what people say. The move to get DJ Moore was very intentional & GM Brandon Beane believes Moore is a locked in WR1 for Buffalo. Shakir is going to be a strong contributor but the DJ Moore trade likely hurts his value.
2026.notes: The Bills fired Sean McDermott following their loss to Denver in the playoffs in 2025. Joe Brady (standout OC) was promoted to HCThe Keon Coleman breakout may not ever happen. Bills traded for DJ Moore from Bears & under contract for 4 years. Large opportunity to emerge as main pass catcher in offense. Shakir reliable but no true ceiling yet. Allen 30 but still elite. Bills draft Skyler Bell WR from UConn 6 foor 192 LB 4.40 second 40 yard dash. Large opportunity for Bell in long run. Kincaid health remains a question. Opted to not get PCL surgery AGAIN & new HC Joe Brady says they will manage pain throughout 2026. James Cook will continue to produce as a top 10 PPR fantasy back IF he stays healthy. Very underrated runner.

2024.notes: Young benched. Total rebuild. Hubbard fantasy relevant by default. Legette developmental. Diontae Johnson traded at deadline.

2025.notes: McMillan arrives 1.08 — immediate WR1 candidate. Bryce Young breakout, but not fantasy relevant yet. Panthers make playoffs. Tetairoa emerges as true WR1. Jalen Coker injured but when healthy is SOLID WR2. Xavier Legette is one of the worst 1st round WR of all time. Complete bust. Rico Dowdle overtook Chuba Hubbard as starter. Chuba had calf injury that he missed time for and played through. Chuba was incredibly inneficient. TE play is very rough. Sanders, Tremble, Evans all not providing any fantasy relevance.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 25th in pass blocking (up 2 spots from 2024) & 9th in run blocking (up 3 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: The Carolina Panthers lost starting LT Ikem Ekwonu to injury V rams in 1st round of the NFC Playoffs. They drafted T Monroe Freeling in the 1st round at 19 overall. Panthers were missing ELITE RG Robert Hunt majority of 2025 season. Both additions COULD put this panthers O line inside the top 10 overall. Also signed Rasheed Walker LT from GB.
2026.key_departures: Lost G/C Austin Corbett to Bills in free agency. Lost Rico Dowdle RB to Steelers in Free agency
2026.key_adds: Drafted WR Chris Brazell II in the 3rd round from Tennessee. signed WR John Metchie III in free agency on 1 year deal. signed C Luke Fortner & LT Rasheed Walker (projected Starter) from GB. Panthers signed QB Kenny Pickett (Garbage) to back up Bryce Young. AJ Dillon was also signed as 3rd/4th string RB.
2026.offensive_outlook: The Carolina Panthers have continued to get better and better with Bryce Young under Center. it has been a rough Journey for Bryce in the NFL, but despite what social media says, Bryce has really progressed during his time in Carolina. The Panthers did not add heavily on the offensive side of the ball this offseason, indicating that GM Dan Morgan has full faith that the Panthers offensive weapons are where they need to be have a competitive 2026 season. Carolina losing Rico Dowdle MAY hurt, as Chuba Hubbard has STRUGGLED recently. However Carolina gets RB Jonathon Brooks back from his 2nd torn ACL. IF the 22 year old Brooks is fully healthy, he could quickly elevate this offense. Tet McMillan is a rising star & WR Jalen Coker is one of the most underrated WR in the NFL.
2026.dynasty_implications: Bryce Young does not currently hold non SF fantasy value, but if he breaks out in 2026, he certainly will. However, if Bryce regresses, this offense will be BRUTAL to own any part of. This is a fairly high risk high reward offense to have pieces of. McMillan, Coker, Brooks, and even Metchie III & Brazzell II COULD see their value improve in 2026.
2026.notes: McMillan year 2 primary target share expected. Brazzell round 3 deep threat. Young has 5th year option picked up. Trending in the right direction. Hubbard serviceable, but the former 2nd round pick Jonathon Brooks is coming back from second ACL tear(great potential but all dynasty managers know). it will be interesting to see how Chris Brazzell II works into offense but expect Jalen Coker to be WR2. Xavier Legette may be traded early in the season. Panthers also added WR John Metchie III (Bryce Young's college teammate). This TE room is BRUTAL & you have no business owning any TE on this team. Carolina also may be in the market for a free agent TE like David Njoku (or may potentially trade for one). .

2024.notes: Williams rookie struggled with protection. Moore steady. Offense struggled greatly as a whole. DJ Moore was solid, Keenan Allen left Chargers & was productive verteran. Kmet failed to produce well. Odunze struggled early in the season to find a role in the offense. Looked solid end of the season.

2025.notes: Williams year 2 expected leap. Ben Johnson elite new HC. Odunze primary target. DJ Moore ate up targets but was not main Weapon. Luther Burden MASSIVE breakout back half of season. Coleston Loveland led the team in recieving & completely broke out in the second half of the season. Swift very productive but aging. Kmet basically irrelevant. Kyle Monangai emerged as highly relevant 1B RB to D'Andre Swift. Swift still posted fantastic numbers, but Monangai showed serious flashes as being consistent back.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 3rd overall pass protection (up 13 spots from 2024) & 4th overall run blocking (up 16 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Biggest 2 losses C Drew Dalman retired unexpectedly & LT Ozzy Trapilo suffered serious knee injury sidelining him the entire 2026 season. Bears added C Garrett Bradbury & drafted C Logan Jones in the 2nd round. the line will certainly take a hit, but can still produce at a high level in 2026.
2026.key_departures: Biggest 2 losses C Drew Dalman retired unexpectedly & LT Ozzy Trapilo suffered serious knee injury sidelining him the entire 2026 season. WR DJ Moore traded to Bills for a 2nd round pick. WR Olamide Zaccheaus also left Chicago this offseason. Opening up a massive target opportunity for Bears pass catchers.
2026.key_adds: Bears added WR Kalif Raymond from Lions (expected to operate as WR3 because Ben Johnson loves him). Drafted Rookie WR Zavion Thomas 3rd round. Drafted TE Sam Roush RD 3.
2026.offensive_outlook: Caleb Williams broke out in 2025 and showed everyone why he was the #1 overall pick. His future could not be brighter in Chicago. The Bills lost DJ Moore & Olamide Zaccheaus opening up a large opportunity for Rome Odunze & Luther Burden III to step into major roles in the offense. Colston Loveland produced at a VERY high level at the end of 2025 & is looking like a top dynasty asset.
2026.dynasty_implications: Whoever emerges as Caleb Williams primary target will be an ELITE fantasy asset to own. We still do not know with 100% certainy who that will be. You may think it would be Rome Odunze, but Luther Burden III has shown a TON of promise. There is room for both of these young WR to eat, but Colston Loveland may be the real beneficiary of the additional targets. he looks like a true star. RB room is likely a 1A/1B for the foreseable future. Both Swift and Monangai see their value skyrocket if the other gets hurt.
2026.notes: Strong disagreement who the WR1 will be in 2026. Odunze looked fantastic early in 2025, but Burden stole the show in the back half of the season. Loveland has emerged as Williams favorite target. Caleb Williams is set to have an excellent season again. RB room looks to remain the same with Swift 1A & Monangai 1B. Bears drafted TE Sam Roush in the 3rd round. Cole Kmet may be traded. Highly relevant fantasty offense.

2024.notes: Chase 1,700 yards elite. Higgins contract holdout then extended. Brown elite recieving back with high production. Burrow could have won MVP. Tee Higgins struggled to stay Healthy. Bengals defense struggled & Bengals were down in most games

2025.notes: Chase locked in as top dynasty WR. Brown proving himself. TE position weak. Burrow turf Toe Injury missed almost entire season. Joe Flacco traded to Bengals by Browns. Chase, Tee, Brown fantasy value saved. Could not produce with AWFUL QB play from Jake Browning (literally worst QB in NFL History). Bengals offensive line struggled. Defense struggled even more. One of the worst defenses in the NFL & Bengals couldnt make the playoffs.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 10th overall pass blocking (up 20 spots from 2024) & 25th overall run blocking (up 2 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: The o line remains mainly the same. It will likely remain a slightly below average O line in 2026. Captain OT Orlando Brown Jr was extended on a 2 year deal (massive for outlook).
2026.key_departures: No key departures
2026.key_adds: Retain G Dalton Risner & OT Orlando Brown Jr. Added C Connor Lew in the 4th round from Auburn & WR Colbie Young from Georgia in the 4th round.
2026.offensive_outlook: Bengals offense stays relatively the same going into 2026. IF Joe Burrow can stay healthy this is a top 5 offense in the NFL & Ja'marr, Tee Higgins, and Chase brown are all home run hitters. GOOD NEWS is Joe Flacco is staying in Cincinatti for another season. He not only acts as the Burrow handcuff but proved that he can support a productive offense if he has to start in Burrow's place.
2026.notes: Burrow and the Bengals look to get back on track & healthy for the 2026 season. Chase & Higgins are set to have fantastic years if the team is healthy. Chase Brown should see his fantasy value stay high in 2026 with Burrow back but it remains to be seen if he is the long term RB solution for Cincinatti. TE play does not typically produce consistent fantasy relevance. Bengals have added heavily on defense this offseason & should be more competitive. Worth note, if the Bengals do not play well this season HC Zac Taylor is going to be fired.

2024.notes: Watson tore achilles. Complete rebuild mode. Jeudy traded to CLE from Denver but offense struggled. Njoku great but only with Winston.

2025.notes: Joe Flacco started the season as the starter afer Browns drafted Shedeur Sanders in the 5th round & Dillon Gabriel in the 3rd. Flacco eventually traded to Bengals. Gabriel started majority of the season and was AWFUL. Sheduer was decent when he played but also not fantasy relevant. Watson missed entire season recovering from torn Achilles. Only fantasy relevant player was Quinshon Judkins who missed the entire pre season due to legal issues. He eventually suffered brutal season ending injury. Dylan Sampson flashed but likely holds no value. Harold Fannin Jr. emerged as a fantastic NFL rookie TE with REAL upside.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 31 overall pass blocking (down 7 spots from 2024) & 31st in run blocking (down 14 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: MASSIVE OVERHAUL for browns line this offseason: Brought in LG Zion Johnson, Center Elgton Jenkins, RT Tytus Howard, & drafted LT Spencer Fano in the 1st round. Its a completely new unit under HC Todd Monken. should be an average unit in the NFL.
2026.key_departures: TE David Njoku left the Browns & is still a free agent. Only key loss.
2026.key_adds: MASSIVE OVERHAUL for browns line this offseason: Brought in LG Zion Johnson, Center Elgton Jenkins, RT Tytus Howard, & drafted LT Spencer Fano in the 1st round. Its a completely new unit under HC Todd Monken.
2026.offensive_outlook: The Browns offense MAY have some hope if the brand new O line can perform. If it is similar to last season, the Browns are in for yet another brutal year. The key will also be who lands the starting QB job. Currently, Deshaun Watson has the

to be the week 1 starter for the Browns. Deshaun is recovering from his second torn achilles. If he can't play at a high level anymore, Shedeur Sanders will get the start. Shedeur has reportedly been in the Browns facility every day this offseason. The Browns revamped the o line but also drafted WR KC Concepcion Round 1 and WR Denzel Boston Round 2. This is a MAJOR problem for Cedric Tillman & Isaiah Bond (likely worthless) and should SERIOUSLY hurt Jerry Jeudy value. Harold Fannin Jr remains a very interesting potential star TE.
2026.dynasty_implications: Historically, this has been a brutal offense to own in fantasy. Other than TE and RB, not much fantasy relevance has come out of Cleveland in some time. Things could change with the new O line & KC & Boston arriving. Cleveland HAS to figure out the QB situation before we can have full confidence in any of these players, but the pieces may be falling in place for multiple guys to be weekly starters.
2026.notes: Browns drafted OT Spencer Fano RD 1 & WR KC Concepcion RD 1 in 2026 draft. Round 2 they took Denzel Boston. Concepcion & Boston can have fantasy value IF Cleveland figures out QB position. Browns fired HC Stefanski & hired Jesse Minter. Jerry Jeudy will likely struggle to have real fantasy value with the new rookies introduced. Harold Fannin has strong value with David Njoku leaving Cleveland. Njoku is still a free agent & COULD potentially return to Cleveland but it is unlikely. RB Quinshon Judkins was a real star of the Browns offense in 2025 and far outperformed Dylan Sampson. Judkins should be 100% recovered from his season ending leg injury he suffered in 2025 by week 1 2026.

2024.notes: Dak torn Hamstring. Only played 8 games. Cooper rush struggled at QB. Rico Dowdle emerged as RB1 and Elliot returned to back him up but was washed. Ceedee Lamb played through injury most of the season but offense struggled. Jake Ferguson emerged as solid TE but QB play held the offense back.

2025.notes: Cowboys traded a 3rd round pick to the Steelers for George Pickens & he completely broke out. Ceedee Lamb missed time with injury & struggled with drops. Jevonte Williams was signed in free agency & was a top RB in the NFL (finally recovered from torn ACL, MCL, LCL, & PCL injury). Ryan Flournoy emerged as clear WR3 in Dallas offense.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 16th in pass protection (up 3 spots from 2024) & 11th overall in run blocking (up 7 spots from 2024)
2026.key_departures: WR Jalen Tolbert signed with Miami Dolphins (minor)
2026.key_adds: George Pickens was franchised tagged & will play 2026 season in Dallas (barring trade or hold out).
2026.offensive_outlook: Marquez Valdes-Scantling (minor)
2026.dynasty_implications: Cowboys offense remains essentially the same in 2026 but will be paired with a significantly more competitive defense. This is very important because there were multiple games last year where Cowboys had to pull starters in the 4th quarter because they were getting blown out. This is a high powered offense that can sustain 2 WR1s in fantasy. The real question remains if George Pickens is going to land an extension in Dallas. There is no TRUE line of sight into this yet. Jerry Jones says he wants him to be a Cowboy for the long term, but we can't trust Jerry. If someone paid enough George is gone. Ceedee is not expected to be a top 5 WR with Pickens playing at his 2025 levels, but can absolutely be a top 10 PPR fantasy WR. Ceedee is an elite WR. Cowboys also lock down Javonte Williams on 3 year exention. ]
2026.notes: Dallas has added significantly on defense this offseason and should be VERY competitive. Multiple games last year caused starters to be benched due to blow outs. Dak remains a highly productive aging QB with a well balanced pass and rush offense. Javonte Williams landed massive 3 year extension with Cowboys & George Pickens has been franchised tagged with no current plans to land long term extension. Ceedee Lamb looks to get back on track as a top 5 WR following a rough 2025. Pickens and Ceedee should both be viewed as Dynasty WR1s. Jake Ferguson is expected to also have a great 2026 season. We want to own as many pieces of this offense as we can FOR THE RIGHT PRICE.

2024.notes: Nix solid rookie. Sutton finally had QB. Franklin promising. McLaughlin efficient. Payton scheme working.

2025.notes: Broncos offense BROKE OUT in 2025. Bo Nix emerged as GREAT low end QB1 in fantasy. WR room was difficult to predict other than Sutton (Bo Nix favorite target). Troy Franklin broke out as the WR2 and was a great deep threat. Broncos drafted RJ Harvey high in the draft but then signed JK Dobbins in free agency. Dobbins functioned as the RB1 & Harvey worked in. Looked good when in, but when Dobbins went down & went to IR, Harvey was highly productive in the back half of the season. Evan Engram was a WALKING TRASH CAN and one of the biggest dissapointments in the entire NFL. Pat Bryant looked solid & so did Marvin Mims Jr as depth players.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 6th overall pass blocking (up 5 spots from 2024) & 5th overall run blocking (down 4 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Projected to 5 offensive line again.
2026.key_departures: No key departures on offense
2026.key_adds: A key add is Broncos QB coach Davis Webb was promoted to OC & will handle play calling in 2026. Webb was a potential head coach candidate & Denver maintains a great weapon on their coaching staff. Broncos traded 1st round pick for WR Jaylen Waddle from dolphins. He will likely function as teams WR1. Broncos also drafted RB Jonah Coleman in the 4th round from washington & TE Justin Joly in the 5th round.
2026.offensive_outlook: The Broncos offense broke out in 2025 under Sean Payton but was not able to do it for the entire game. They were known for their slow first halfs & turning it on in the second half. IF this offense can start fast and sustain momentum the entire game, this is a top 5 offense in the NFL. However, there are a LOT of mouths to feed in Denver, making projections very hard. Bo Nix is the biggest beneficiary, but there are going to be major winners on this offense
2026.dynasty_implications: The Jaylen Waddle trade is probably bad for Waddle & Suttons value. It is likely worse for Sutton than Waddle though. The RB room is also nearly impossible to predict. What we do know: if a RB is featured on this offense they are a weekly RB1, but JK Dobbins, Harvey, and now Coleman will be difficult to trust when all three are healthy. WR 3 - WR 6 on Denver all are promising young WR and could be potential trade targets for WR needy teams early in 2026.
2026.notes: Bo Nix will be 100% healthy by camp following foot injury in NFL playoffs. Broncos traded their 2026 1st round pick for Dolphins WR Jaylin Waddle. This will significantly reduce Sutton's role as the alpha in the offense. Pat Bryant & Troy Franklin will likely have trade interest but if they stay on the team will have reduced roles. Broncos backfield is incredibly difficult to project & will need to be monitored all summer. Denver extended JK Dobbins & Drafted Jonah Coleman in the 5th round. Dobbins expected to be 1A and Harvey 1B, with Coleman as reserve, but Sean Payton as HC can do whatever he wants. Broncos drafted TE Justin Joly in the 5th round who has a small chance to be relevant because Evan Engram is legit trash

2024.notes: Gibbs 1,000+ every way. Williams breakout. ARSB elite. LaPorta solid. Best offense in NFL.

2025.notes: Gibbs elite dynasty RB. Williams ascending WR2. ARSB still WR1. LaPorta consistent but suffered serious back injury that caused him to miss the half of the 2025 season. Montgomery took a back seat to Gibbs but was productive when he played. Offense struggled more than usual & missed the playoffs unexpectedly. Goff remains a low end QB1 with high upside because of the high powered oppportunity for Lions to drop 50 points in any given game. Raymond functioned as a gadget WR3 and held little value while TeSlaa showed serious flashes and was a red zone power house.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 9th in pass blocking in 2025 (down 3 spots from 2024) & 7th in run blocking (down 3 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: This stands to be a top 10 line again in 2026. Adding OT Blake Miller round 1.
2026.key_departures: WR Kalif Raymond left to join Ben Johnson with the Bears. Lost T Taylor Decker & G Graham Glasgow. RB David Montgomery was also traded to the Texans.
2026.key_adds: Lions have a new OC in Drew Petzing (coming over from Arizona after the entire coaching staff was let go). Petzing is an interesting hire & did not have success in Arizona. But no doubt this offense can succeed at a high rate under him. Drafted WR Kendrick Law in the 5th round. Signed RB Isiah Pacheco from Chiefs in free agency. Signed C Cade Mays from panthers to 3 year deal. Traded for additional O line man Juice Scruggs in David Montgomery trade. Added TE Tyler Conklin behind TE Sam LaPorta
2026.offensive_outlook: If Detroit gets back on track this can be the number 1 offense in the NFL. St. Brown, Gibbs, Williams can all be INSANE producers with unreal ceilings every week. Goff will continue to be a low end QB1 due to the passing TD & yards volume (no mobility).
2026.notes: Gibbs + Williams + ARSB all dynasty assets. David Montgomery was traded to the Houston Texans & opens the opportunity for Gibbs to be completely featured in this offense. If he can stay healthy, he may be the RB1 in fantasy for years to come. Lions brought in Isiah Pacheco as RB2 from the Chiefs on a 1 year deal. He is not expected to play very much, but could be relevant with Gibbs injury. Khalif Raymond heads to Chicago Bears & Kendrick Law COULD emerge as a solid WR4 or WR3 in the long run. Isaac TeSlaa holds significant value if St Brown or Williams were injured. Williams & St Brown are both excellent assets. Goff remains a interesting aging QB that is a low end QB1 in fantasy with a VERY high weekly ceiling but no mobility upside. A key potential bit to keep an eye on is the status of Sam LaPorta follwing his season ending back injury in 2025. He needs to get back to 100% and prove it before we completely trust him. Tough injury for a TE or any football player.

2024.notes: Love solid. Reed consistent slot. GB signs Josh Jacobs in free agency & let Aaron Jones walk. Packers draft promising backup RB MarShawn Lloyd who could not stay healthy. Emmanuel Wilson emerges as solid backup RB. Tucker Kraft emerges as premium TE in the NFL. Fantastic player. Jordan Love plays well but remains low end QB1 in fantasy with high volatility.

2025.notes: Reed missed extended time with injury and only played 7 games. Doubs emerged as WR1 with Christian Watson showing flashes of being a true X/Deep threat WR at times. Tucker Kraft tore ACL & missed half of the season. Josh Jacobs regressed but so did the entire offense. Malik Willis played 4 games with Jordan Love missing time due to injury and BALLED OUT. Packers drafted Matthew Golden in the 1st round of the NFL draft & he did not get involved much on the offense. Golden looked good when he got the ball, but was not a massive part of the game plan

2026.oline_2025_stats: 26th overall in pass protection (down 22 spots since 2024) & 23rd in run blocking (down 7 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: This O line struggled to protect in 2025 & is slated to be an average or slightly below average unit in 2026.
2026.key_departures: Rasheed Walker starting O lineman left to Panthers. RB Emmanuel Wilson left, opening up backup and 3rd down back role for another RB to fill the gap. Romeo Doubs to New England Patriots, Wicks to Eagles. Massive opportunity for Watson, Golden, and Reed. We will have to see who plays the most on 2 WR sets.
2026.key_adds: Drafted Jager Burton C in the 5th round, extended Jayden Reed on 3 year deal.
2026.notes: Key departures: Romeo Doubs to New England Patriots, Wicks to Eagles. Massive opportunity for Watson, Golden, and Reed. We will have to see who plays the most on 2 WR sets. Reed landed 3 year 50m extension with packers. Golden could be primed for a breakout. Kraft should be recovered from torn ACL early in the season & Musgrave will fill in if he misses time but no true upside to him. Savion Williams will compete for WR4 but it is unlikely he holds any true value. Jordan Love needs to stay healthy but could be primed for a great 2026 season. Josh Jacobs is showing signs for concern with efficiency & managers need to think about him, however, packers have not brought in any competition so in the meantime he should be ok. The departure of Emmanuel Wilson to Seattle should not be underlooked. He was a highly productive back up RB & could open the door for a healthy Josh Jacobs to return to his peak form briefly. AND another RB will assume a very potentially productive handcuff opportunity.

2024.notes: Collins injured but WR1 when healthy. Diggs arrived & tore ACL. Dell brutal injury. Mixon efficient. Dell promising. Stroud solid. Contender window.

2025.notes: Collins back healthy — WR1. Dell misses entire season due to 2024 knee injury. Joe Mixon misses entire season with foot injury (shot himself in the foot is the word on the street). Pass game struggled because Stroud regressed behind HORRENDOUS O line play. Drafted Higgins & Noel in 2nd & 3rd round. Higgins showed a lot of promise. Could progress. Nick Chubb regressed heavily (cooked). Woody Marks showed a lot of promise as a rookie RB. Strong recieving back. Not projected to be workhorse back.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 18 overall pass blocking (up 8 spots from 2024) & 29th in run blocking (down 3 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Multiple starting changes. Will likely be slightly below average O line in 2026.
2026.key_adds: Texans signed starting LG Wyatt Teller & starting RT Braden Smith this offseason. Also drafted C Keylan Rutledge in the 1st round. all 3 upgrades to last year. Should help protect CJ Stroud & HOPEFULLY GET A RUN GAME GOING IN HOUSTON. Traded for Lions RB David Montgomery. Joe mixon saw great success in 2024 & Montgomery COULD see a high degree of success too. Drafted WR Lewis Bond as well who does not have immediate upside.
2026.offensive_outlook: CJ Stroud is the opposite of Bryce Young & has regressed every single year he has been in the league. However, CJ has shown he can play at a very high level. IF this O line can protect, the Texans offense has potential to support multiple highly relevant fantasy assets in 2026 and into the future. WR Nico Collins looks to get back on track as a true WR1 & WR Jayden Higgins is a TRUE breakout candidate going into 2026 if things go his way. We will see if Tank Dell's knee works still. Hoping it does, but don't count on it.
2026.dynasty_implications: If this offense could produce at a higher level than 2025, this will be an offense you want to have pieces of. David Montgomery COULD be a very interesting high end RB2 as long as RB Woody Marks does not eat into his PT too much. Houston also has arguably the best defense in the entire NFL. they will keep them in every game & force turnovers to get this offense the ball back.
2026.notes: Nico Collins remains a high producing dynasty WR when CJ Stroud plays well. Texans have to improve O line play for offense to provide large fantasy relevance. Traded for David Montgomery from the Lions & He will operate as RB1 with Woody Marks expected to also work in. CJ Stroud has struggled since his rookie season & is a mid range QB2 most weeks in fantasy. Texans do expect to extend him long term despite poor play. Jayden Higgins is an interesting year 2 breakout candidate but Tank Dell also returns in 2026 (We will see if his knee still works).

2024.notes: Richardson inconsistent but dynamic. Joe Flacco elevated offense when played. JT struggled with injuries at end of season but very productive. Pittman steady. Downs solid slot. Alex Pierce led the team in recieving. Emerged as premier deep threat WR. Mitchell developing slowly.

2025.notes: Colts sign Daniel Jones who beats out Anthony Richardson in camp. Alec Pierce emerges as ELITE deep threat WR. Pittman Jr. productive but takes back seat behind Pierce. Tyler Warren drafted in the 1st round & makes immediate impact. Jonathan Taylor was on pace for historic season before Daniel Jones tears achilles. Replaced Jones with Philip Rivers (offense struggled). Josh Downs struggled with injuries but highly productive slot WR. DJ Giddens pure back up to Taylor. Taylor workhorse back. Mitchell traded to the Jets.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 8th in pass blocking (up 4 spots from 2024) & 6th overall run blocking (down 5 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: O line remains the same outlook as 2025. Should be a top 10 unit across the board
2026.key_departures: WR Michael Pittman Jr traded to Steelers. QB Anthony Richardson requested a trade & will not play again for the Colts.
2026.key_adds: Colts brought in WR Nick Westbrook-Ikhine in free agency. Westbrook-Ikhine was a highly dynamic WR while in Tennessee. Could be nohting, but could help.
2026.offensive_outlook: There is so much opportunity for Alec Pierce & Josh Downs to become HIGHLY productive fantasy WR. Tyler Warren could also eat up Michael Pittman targets that are leaving. If Daniel Jones can play at a high level, this offense will be on fire again. There remains a chance Jones had a fluke beginning to the 2025 season & returns back to earth after the achilles injury, but man he looked legit in 2025.
2026.dynasty_implications: The Colts seriously need Daniel Jones to BE THAT GUY. Taylor, Downs, and especially Alec Pierce rely on having a highly productive passing game that helps lift the entire offense as whole. Tyler Warren has shown flashes of being the next George Kittle, really awesome player.
2026.notes: Anthony Richardson will be traded or released. Daniel Jones on track for full recovery from torn achilles & landed extension. Very positive for offense. Jonathan Taylor aging but HIGHLY productive. Alec Pierce lands MASSVIVE 4 year contract & Colts invested in him as their WR1. Josh Downs is primed for an increase workload & could truly break out in 2026. Michael Pittman Jr. traded to Steelers. Tyler Warren is a top TE in dynasty & could have a MASSIVE season next year.

2024.notes: BTJ electric rookie WR1. Lawrence shoulder injury mid season. Mac Jones fills in & Brian Thomas Jr posts INSANE rookie season. True rookie break out. Etienne STRUGGLED. Parker Washington emerges as WR2 behind Thomas. Christian Kirk awful. Engram fading. Brenton Strange breaks out at TE behind Engram

2025.notes: Jaguars trade future first to acquire Travis Hunter who has slow start to season. Posts 1 massive game & injured for rest of season. Jaguars trade for Jakobi Meyers from Raiders & extend 3 years. Operates as 1b WR. Brian Thomas Jr. has worst sophmore slump season to record & struggles with drop & production issues. Parker Washington leads team in recieving & has breakout from WR3 position. Travis Etienne Jr. has career turn around & has his best season of career. Brenton Strange struggled with injury but productive when healthy. Trevor Lawrence shows promise as QB but still not QB1 on weekly basis for fantasy, could become a QB1 though.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 7th in pass blocking (up 13 spots from 2024) & 13th in run blocking (up 18 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: O Line should still be an above average unit in 2026.
2026.key_departures: Travis Etienne Jr. left Jacksonville for Saints in free agency.
2026.key_adds: Chris Rodriguez Jr. signed 2 year deal (previously with commanders). Nate Boerkircher TE 2nd round. 2 6th round WR Josh Cameron & CJ Williams.
2026.notes: Travis Etienne Jr. has left the Jaguars in free agency for the Saints. Opening door for Bhayshul Tuten to operate as team lead back. Jaguars sign Chris Rodriguez Jr. to 2 year deal from Commanders. Jaguars draft Nate Boerkircher (TE) in 2nd round and should cause competition for Brenton Strange. Also drafted Josh Cameron & CJ Williams both WR in the 6th round. Travis Hunter is expected to play more CB than WR in 2026, but we will need confirmation through camp (very  bad for dynasty value if true). Brian Thomas Jr looks to return to his rookie form as a true WR1 but Jakobi Meyers may operate as the teams 1A. Parker Washington has potential to be massive contributor in 2026 if BTJ struggles continue.

2024.notes: Rice Knee injury. Worthy explosive rookie but did not meet expectations. Kelce fading fast but still productive. Pacheco solid but inneficient & got injured. Kareem Hunt operated as RB1. Mahomes still wins. Hollywood brown played 2 games due to injury. WR play struggled without Rice.

2025.notes: Worthy struggled again to meet expectations. Rice returned following suspension & was highly productive. Hollywood Brown retruned from injury & was not consistent. Does not have long term value. Kelce looked awful but still produced due to volume but is washed at this point. Pacheco 1A & Hunt 1B. Both AWFUL RB & difficult to start in fantasy. Mahomes dynasty value declining with age & ACL tear end of season but still elite SF. Jalen Royals drafted & produced almost nothing but interesting prospect.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 24th in pass blocking (down 18 spots from 2024) & 27th in run blocking (down 12 spots from 2024)
2026.key_departures: Isiah Pacheco left Chiefs for Lions in free agency. RB Kareem Hunt is also likely gone from the team. WR Hollywood Brown also left to the Eagles in free agency. Chiefs lost RT Jawaan Taylor in free agency (mid).
2026.key_adds: OC Eric Bieniemy retuns to Chiefs as OC. Previously served as OC from 2018 - 2022. Add RB Kenneth Walker III in free agency on massive 3 year deal.
2026.offensive_outlook: Patrick Mahomes was CARRYING the Chiefs in 2025, but the offense just didnt click. Mahomes ended the season by tearing his ACL in the final moments of a loss to the Chargers that ended their playoff hopes. Chiefs look to get the running game fully back on track with the free agent signing of Kenneth Walker III. The WR play HAS to increase for this offense to be successful. Kelce is a shell of his old self & Rashee Rice has been the only consistent WR for Mahomes. Worthy has an opportunity to break out, but he has failed to do so thus far. Thornton is a deep threat WR that could have a high weekly ceiling IF he builds that connection with Pat.
2026.dynasty_implications: Highly relevant offense to own pieces of. Mahomes needs to return to his MVP form to support WR other than Rice, but Kenneth Walker III may be about to feast in KC if he can stay healthy. Of note, if Walker were to suffer an injury, RB Emmett Johnson has a great opportunity to fill in and be a valuable back.
2026.notes: Rashee Rice is slotted to operate as WR1 & holds high value for 2026 season. Mahomes should be recovered from torn ACL. Kelce is in his final season most likely. Xavier Worthy has struggled to produce, could break out, but not looking great right now. Chiefs sign Kenneth Walker III in free agency (reigning superbowl MVP RB from seahawks) and he is set for monster season. Brashard Smith should operate as receiving back and Emmett Johnson will battle for 3rd string back with Emari Demercado.

2024.notes: McConkey breakout rookie. Dobbins efficient when healthy. Harbaugh run-first limits passing. Herbert managed. Quentin Johnson better sophomore season than many realized. Keenan Allen & Mike Williams left opening up opportunity for other players.

2025.notes: Omarion Hampton drafted 1st round. Many expected strong run game, but injuries to Slater & Alt on O line cause Chargers to throw WAY MORE than expected. Quentin Johnson BREAKOUT first half of season but faded off later. Keenan Allen returned & saw significant volume causing Ladd McConkey production to drop significantly. Ladd was dissapointing. Herbert produced well. Vidal was a great 1B RB & filled in with Hampton down. Hampton had a very dissapointing rookie season but showed promise. Tre' Harris dissapointing rookie season and underused. KeAndre Lambert-Smith gained pre season hype but did not produce at all. TE Oronde Gadsden broke out & will be the Chargers TE of the future.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 32nd in pass blocking (down 27 spots from 2024) & 30th in run blocking (down 8 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Offensive line should be top 10 in run and pass pro with Alt & Slater back.
2026.key_departures: Keenan Allen remains a free agent and is not currently expected back with the Chargers
2026.key_adds: Joe Alt & Slater are back. This offense should do a complete 180. Joe Alt & Slater return in 2026 from injury & Chargers add Jake Slaughter LG in the 2nd round of 2026 draft. Sign Tyler Biadasz C, and RG Cole Strange. Entire different O ine from later year. Signed RB Keaton Mitchell to 2 year deal. Signed FB Alex Ingold from Miami. Biggest change is teh offensive Genius Mike McDaniel is the new OC.
2026.offensive_outlook: This could very well be a top 3 offense in the NFL next year. Herbert is geared up for his best season of his career & Ladd McConkey & Quinten Johnston could both post 1000 yard seasons. The key will be to figure out how this RB room shapes up. 2025 rookie Omarion Hampton struggled to produce last year & now Chargers bring in RB Keaton Mitchell. We COULD see a bit of a committee start to form.
2026.dynasty_implications: The top targets and back in this offense will be STELLAR fantasy assets in 2026 and beyond. Herbert SHOULD have a killer season in 2026.
2026.notes: Chargers bring in Mike McDaniel as offensvie coordinator who could SUPERCHARGE offense. Herbert ascending as top 7 dynasty QB. Keenan Allen remains a free agent. Ladd & QJ should operate as 1A & 1B with Ladd having more potential. Tre' Harris should operate as WR3 if no one else is brought in. TE Oronde Gadsden could be very good. RB room is complex. Hampton is the presumed starter week 1 with massive potential but Vidal has been very capable as a back up & chargers also signed Keaton Mitchell to 2 year deal in free agency. Question mark people should think about in usage. Thompson round 4.

2024.notes: Nacua WR1 fully. Williams 1,200 yards. Kupp decline phase. Stafford old but producing at high level. McVay system elite.

2025.notes: Nacua is a dynasty cornerstone. Rams sign Davante Adams & he produces at high level when healthy (especially in red zone). Stafford aging but wins MVP. Blake Corum worked in & eroded Kyren Williams dynasty value. Much more of a split than many people thought it would be. Cooper Kupp left for Seahawks.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 2nd in pass protection (up 15 spots from 2024) & 1st in run blocking (up 8 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Elite O line in 2026 again.
2026.key_departures: RT Rob Havenstein retired.
2026.key_adds: Ty Simpson Drafted 13th overall. TE Max Klare 2nd round. OT Keagen Trost 3rd round. CJ Daniels WR 6th round.
2026.offensive_outlook: This is a top 3 offense in the NFL. Stafford is playing at an MVP level & supporting a top 5 WR in Puka Nacua and a solid WR in Adams. As Adams ages, another WR will have an opportunity to step up.
2026.dynasty_implications: The highest producers in this offense will be incredibly valuable. Ty Simpson should maintain high value in dynasty at least until he starts in 2028 after Stafford leaves.
2026.notes: Rams draft Ty Simpson in the 1st round but Stafford is rumored to be signing 2 year extension. Simpson likely to sit until 2028 season. Best for him for development. Stafford will play at MVP level until retires more than likely. Puka has had off field trouble and spent time in Rehab, but should be ready by week 1. Rams draft TE Max Klare early & will likely be TE1 ahead of Parkinson but may not be. RB room is confusing, Corum has potential to overtake Kyren Williams in 2026 season. Both backs hold high value if the other is hurt. Adams only has 1 or 2 more years in him.

2024.notes: Bowers 1,194 yards — elite TE2 rookie. Adams traded mid-season. QB still terrible. Total rebuild.

2025.notes: Bowers struggled with injuries but still TE1 in dynasty. Tre Tucker showed flashes of being a contributor on offense. Geno Smith was a WALKING TRASH CAN in this offense. One of the worst offensive lines of all time. Ashton Jeanty struggled behind terrible offensive line. Looked good on some opportunities and still have high hope for top 5 RB. Jach Bech was a massive rookie disapointment and Dont'e Thornton Jr. MAY not be able to play football (Trash).

2026.oline_2025_stats: 23rd in pass protection in 2025 (down 1 spot) & 32nd in run blocking (down 4 spots)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: O Line should be improved adding Tyler Linderbaum (C) & Spencer Burford (LG). It will likely still be BELOW AVERAGE.
2026.key_departures: QB Geno Smith was traded to the Jets.
2026.key_adds: Drafted Fernando Mendoza 1 overall. Kirk Cousins signed in free agency on vet minimum deal. C Tyler Linderbaum landed HUGE deal coming over from Baltimore (top center in NFL). WR Jalen Nailor landed a 3 year deal & COULD be raiders WR1 IF no other veterans are brought in.
2026.offensive_outlook: Mendoza is the future and Kirk will fill in for the short term. Brock Bowers could become a GENERATIONAL TE if QB play is figured out. Jeanty will not be able to produce until this line can block. Raiders have taken good steps, but it isn't complete yet.
2026.dynasty_implications: If this offense can click, the top players in this offense will all have their values increase significantly. There is talent here: Bowers, Jeanty, Mendoza. But this WR corp is lacking, however Tucker, Nailor, Bech, and even Thornton Jr have a huge opportunity to step up.
2026.notes: Mendoza 1.01 franchise QB of the future. Raiders also signed Kirk Cousins & he is assumed week 1 starter. Mendoza may not play early half of season unless beats Cousins out in camp. Raiders spent big in free agency and O line should be better but still bad. Buy Bowers long-term. Monitor Mendoza development. Raiders will probably sign a veteran WR who could operate as WR1, either Jauan Jennings or Diggs or Tyreek Hill or Keenan Allen potentially. Tyreek Hill also an option. Mike Washington Jr will back up Ashton Jeanty. New HC Klint Kubiak former Seahawks OC should also boost offense creativity.

2024.notes: Tua concussions again. Hill still produced. Waddle solid. Achane 1,000 yards. Jonnu 67 catches.

2025.notes: Tua looked absolutely AWFUL at QB eventually being benched for Ewers. Tyreek Hill blew up knee looking at 12+ month recovery. Achane absolutely ELITE RB. Jaylen Waddle operated as teams WR1 once Tyreek Hill went down. Malik Washington is not good but had production due to volume. Darren Waller (old) was productive but hurt all the time. Greg Dulcich was productive TE.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 11th in pass blocking (up 10 spots from 2024) & 19th in run blocking (up 4 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Miami Drafted Kadyn Proctor RG in round 1 of the NFL draft. Should help the unit but it will be around average or slightly below average
2026.key_departures: Tua Tagovailoa was released, Tyreek Hill was released, WR Jaylen Waddle was traded, and TE Darren Waller remains a free agent.
2026.key_adds: QB Malik Willis signed to 3 year deal (was with Green Bay), RG Kadyn Proctor RD 1 RG, WR Caleb Douglas 3rd round draft pick, WR Chris Bell 3rd round draft pick, signed WR Jalen Tolbert, signed WR Tutu Atwell, signed WR Terrace Marshall Jr
2026.offensive_outlook: This offense has had the highest turnover of any offense we have seen in recent history AND the Dolphins remian in cap hell. Miami is making a big bet on Willis and believes he can be a franchise QB. 2026 will likey be ROUGH, but Willis has shown flashes of being a true dual threat starting QB in the NFL. The odds are stacked against him though. This WR room is young and has talent but there is no guarantee there is an NFL WR1 in this entire room. Someone will be the beneficiary of a high workload though and become fantasy relevant, we will get a better picture this summer.
2026.notes: Dolphins sign Malik Willis in free agency to 3 year deal. Mobile QB with high fantasy upside. Offense skill positions (other than Achance) now worst in NFL. Unsure who starting WR will be. Dolphins drafted Caleb Douglas & Chris Bell (both have very good potential). Malik Washington is not good, Tutu Atwell unlikely to be highly productive, Terrace Marshall & Turpin also signed. Both are also not good. Greg Dulcich does have potential if Willis can get the offense working

2024.notes: Darnold surprise Pro Bowl season. Jefferson elite. Addison solid. Jones 1,000 yards. Hockenson returned.

2025.notes: JJ Nine McCarthy turned out to be one of the worst QBs to ever play football. The offense literally could't do anything with him at QB. Wentz was not much better. Max Brosmer was straight BUTT. Jefferson & Addison struggled to produce but that was it was out of their control. TJ Hockenson struggled and did not look good. Nailor was a productive WR3 & showed a lot of promise. Disaster season. Jones could not stay healthy & regressed while Jordan Mason was inneficient with increased opportunity.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 22nd in pass protection in 2025 (down 14 spots from 2024) & 10th in run blocking (up 9 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Expected to be average O line in 2026
2026.key_departures: Jalen Nailor WR3 left to Raiders in free agency. Pretty solid loss that opens up a decent target
2026.key_adds: Kyler Murray QB from Cardinals (former 1st overall pick).
2026.offensive_outlook: This offense struggled in 2025 & fell off harder than any offense we have seen in the past. The team struggled to move the ball at all. JJ McCarthy was AWFUL and a complete waste of a 1st round pick. Minnesota looks to get back on track by bringing in Kyler Murray. Murray signs a 1 year vet minimum deal and is working to prove he is still a starting NFL QB. Murray has the ability to be a franchise QB, but he has never supported ELITE WR production. Interested to see how Jefferson & Addison fare with Kyler at QB. And no, JJ McCarthy is not going to have a future in Minnesota, he is a walking trash can and couldn't start in the UFL.
2026.dynasty_implications: Jefferson and Addison have all the talent in the world they & KOC is an elite coach, but this team needs to feed them. This RB room struggled last year. Difficult to say if Aaron Jones & Jordan mason regressed or if teams just focused on stopping the run to force JJ McCarthy to throw them another Pick 6. Either way, running game has to get established in 2026. Likely a committee as Aaron Jones was expected to be cut but took a pay cut to come back.
2026.notes: Jefferson dynasty cornerstone regardless of QB. Vikings sign Kyler Murray from Cardinals who is looking to turn around career. Kyler will compete with McCarthy for QB1 spot but JJ Nine McCarthy is BOOTY CHEEKS, so Kyler will start & could elevate offense a lot. Jefferson long term value there regardless of QB, Addison is great WR but volume still isnt there, interesting buy if can get him for cheap. Aaron Jones may phase out and took a pay cut to stay. Mason is mid. Rookie RB Claiborne COULD build out a role if he can beat out Mason. Hockenson should be better than last year but his play has declined a lot.

2024.notes: Maye arrived late. Stevenson still got work. Maye started after 8 games and looked very solid. He was the 3rd overall pick with lots of potential. WR play lacked. Boutte & Douglas showed flashes to be contributors. Bourne was a solid WR as well. Polk was a complete bust & complete BOOTY. Gibson operated as RB2.

2025.notes: Maye full season — top dynasty QB target. Stefon Diggs emerged as WR1 & had highly productive season. Hunter Henry Drake Maye favorite TE and was inconsistent, but productive. Boutte showed flashes of a breakout but it never came. Mack Hollins was productive but didnt hold value. Henderson did not play much & struggled first half of season but eventually overtook Stevenson as RB1. Stevenson still played a major part in the offense despite worse play. Drake Maye emerged as #1 dynasty asset potential with ELITE upside & consistency.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 27th in pass protection in 2025 (Up 5 spots from 2024) & 14 in run blocking (up 18 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Drafted LT Caleb Lomu 1st round to beef up Tackle position. Supposedly Will Campbell is staying at LT, but we will see after that brutal rookie season. Hopefully can be an average or above average unit in 2026.
2026.key_departures: WR Stefon Diggs (released), RB Antonio Gibson (released), TE Austin Hooper (signed with Falcons), OT Vederian Lowe signed with 49ers (depth)
2026.key_adds: Romeo Doubs WR from GB on 4 year deal, AJ Brown traded to Patriots by Eagles in June 2026 (will be teams WR1 in 2026). Drafted Caleb Lomu 1st round LT. Drafted TE Eli Raridon 3rd round. Drafted RB Jam Miller 7th round.
2026.offensive_outlook: Drake Maye emerged as one of the best QB in the entire NFL last year functioning as a dual threat QB with an elite arm. If Maye can get the pass protection he needs, Doubs & AJ Brown can both produce at a high level. With the new addition of Brown and Doubs, Boutte Douglas, Hollins, Williams will all have back seat roles. One of them may be a trade candidate.
2026.dynasty_implications: This is an offense that is only getting better. TreVeyon Henderson COULD become the true featured RB on this high powered offense. AJ Brown could produce 2-3 more years at a VERY high level before fading. Romeo Doubs fits in very well and if his connection builds with Maye, he could be a very viable WR2 in PPR formats.
2026.notes: Maye dynasty franchise QB. Patriots signed Romeo Doubs from Packers (huge potential and solid player could be WR2). The Patriots WILL trade for AJ Brown from Eagles & he will be their WR1 next year. He has MASSIVE potential with Drake Maye. Henderson should operate as lead back in 2026, but Vrabel has done strange things with playing time for backs & Stevenson will work in. Henry is still TE1, but drafted Raridon round 3 TE — Vrabel uses TEs.

2024.notes: Olave injury. Shaheed dynamic deep threat. Kamara final relevant year. Carr mediocre. Rebuild needed.

2025.notes: Carr retired. Rattler struggled early & replaced by Shough who BALLED OUT. Shaheed traded to Seahawks mid season. Full rebuild mode. Kamara washed, hurt & not productive. Kendre Miller showed promise but got hurt Devin Neal & Audric Estime filled in. Chris Olave was hihgly productive. Amazing year and fully healthy (super slept on). Vele showed promise for potential breakout.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 21st in pass blocking in 2025 (up 8 spots from 2024) & 28th in run blocking (down 15 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: LG David Edwards from Buffalo is a new projected started
2026.key_departures: No key departures
2026.key_adds: signed RB Travis Etienne Jr in free agency on massive 4 year deal. Signed TE Noah Fant. Drafted TE oscar Delp. Drafted WR Jordyn Tyson 8th overall.
2026.offensive_outlook: The offense significantly improved under Tyler Shough lst year when he took over Spencer Rattler. This offense is only adding talent & SHough was already a productive fantasy QB in 2025. IF Shough takes another step forward, this offense could support decent fantasy output (also helps Saints defense is still mid & they will likely be trailing in games).
2026.notes: Saints draft Jordyn Tyson 8th overall. To start he will likely be the 1B in the offense behind Chris Olave. Hurts Olave potential, but Olave is highly talented WR. Shough surrounded with Weapons in New Orleans by signing Travis Etienne Jr. in free agency (lots of potential to be high producer). Alvin Kamara value is toast. Interested to see how Olave & Tyson split target share & if the rest of the offense other than Etienne holds fantasy value. Vele is a slept on and talented WR that could also break out in 2026. His breakout to slow down the Jordyn Tyson full breakout year 1.

2024.notes: Nabers elite rookie despite terrible QB. Jones benched/cut. Nabers dynasty value rises to top 3 wr. Wan'Dale Robinson highly productive.

2025.notes: Wilson starts the season & benched for 1st round rookie Jaxon Dart. Dart absolutely electric start to rookie season posting GREAT fantasy numbers. Cam Skattebo highly productive RB, but injured. Malik Nabers tore ACL week 2. Wan'Dale Robinson emerged as WR1 & completely broke out. Tracey value is out the window, won't be highly productive player. Filled in fine, but not the future in NY. Slayton does not have dynasty value.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 28th in pass blocking (up 3 spots from 2024) & 22nd in run blocking (up 3 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Drafted RG Francis Mauigoa 10th overall in draft & signed multiple solid depth pieces. SHould be slightly below average O line.
2026.key_departures: Russell Wilson left to free agency. Won'Dale Robinson left in free agency to the Tennessee Titans (opens up significant amount of targets)
2026.key_adds: Darnell Mooney WR from ATL, Calvin Austin III WR from Steelers, Drafted WR Malachi Fields 3rd round, signed TE Isaiah Likely in free agency, New Coach Jim Harbaugh & new OC Matt Nagy.
2026.offensive_outlook: Jim Harbaugh takes over in New York with an offense that may struggle to produce IF Dart does not play at a very high level. Below average line, below average WR room behind Malik Nabers (recovering from Torn ACL), and an interesting RB room that we believe NY plans to improve in the long run (Doubt Skattebo is the long term RB1). 2026 will likely be another building year for NY where we need to see Dart connect well with Nabers & a TRUE WR2 and WR3 emerge. it could be Mooney have a career turn around, Fields could break out, Calvin Austin could finally figure it out. Likely should help boost the passing game as well.
2026.dynasty_implications: NY still reamins a question mark but there is a lot of potential in this offense if Jaxson Dart turns into the franchise QB. He has a strong arm, is mobile, and plays with a certain type of swagger not all QBs play with. Despite what Ravens fans say, bringing Harbaugh & Nagy into NY is a very good thing. A future HOF coach that is putting his reputation on the line for this team to succeed. Harbaugh has mainly focused on the defense so far, which could imply he thinks the offense is in a good spot, but we will have to see.
2026.notes: Giants fired Daboll & brought in Harbaugh. Harbaugh should revamp offense. Brought it Isaiah Likely from Baltimore who seriously hurts Theo Johnson dynasty value (likely should be good). NY did not draft RB & Skattebo will be the starter week 1 of 2026 unless they add someone. He could have a monster season with his Jaxson Dart connection growing. Jaxson Dart gets to play with Malik Nabers for the first time & connection should be electric. Darnell Mooney is a great signing & is on a 1 year prove it deal in NY. If Dart play continues, Mooney will have value.

2024.notes: Rodgers full season. Hall disappointment. G Wilson steady. Williams injury again. Mediocre offense.

2025.notes: Fields disaster. Brutal season. Wilson hurt most of season. While ELITE WR, cannot produce with HORRIBLE QB play. Hall failed to meet expectations again with Braelon Allen & Isaiah Davis eating into carries. Mitchell had flashes as a WR2, but lacked consistency. John Metchie III played decent. Mason Taylor played very well.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 30th in pass protection (down 15 spots from 2024) & 15th in run blocking (up 9 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Bring in Dylan Parham LG from Raiders, but this O line is probably going to struggle big time again in 2026.
2026.key_departures: Justin Fields QB traded to Chiefs.
2026.key_adds: QB Geno Smith traded to Jets from Raiders. QB Cade Klubnik drafted 5th round, Kenyon Sadiq drafted 1st round 16th overall. WR Omar Cooper Jr. drafted 1st round 30th overall
2026.offensive_outlook: Aaron Glenn says Geno Smith will lead the Jets to the promised land, but this just isn't going to happen. Aaron Glenn will probably win 1 or 2 games out of his first 8 and be fired mid season. The good news is, Glenn getting out of NY COULD be good for these offensive players. Garrett Wilson owners can ONLY HOPE Wilson somehow gets traded next year. There is a 2% chance or so Geno Smith is a gunslinger again and can support WR1 numbers for the STUD WR Garrett wilson, but its so unlikely. Omar Cooper Jr could be a very good WR2 in the long term for the Jets, but how valuable is WR2 on the Jets if they can't figure out their QB situation and O line. Breece Hall is franchsie tagged & could potentially be traded in 2026 but it is not likely
2026.dynasty_implications: This is a tough offense for fantasy managers to be heavily invested in. An even worse spot for a rookie to be drafted to. Kenyon Sadiq has to be upset. Not only that, but he has to share the TE room with Mason Taylor, who was looking like he could become a top 15 TE. For Garrett Wilson and Breece Hall, realistically for a MASSIVE value spike, they both need to be traded. It will be tough to produce in NY.
2026.notes: Fields traded. Jets bring in Geno Smith from Raiders who was AWFUL in Vegas last year. Could provide decent opportunity for Garrett Wilson (elite WR needs better QB play). Adonai Mitchell likely to play WR3 behind Omar Cooper Jr (round 1 pick). Will have to monitor closely to see. Drafted Kenyon Sadiq Round 1 TE (high ceiling but may take time to break out). Mason Taylor will likely be TE2 behind Sadiq but could be starter at beginning of season. Breece Hall playing on franchise tag. The talent is there, but the offense has to be able to score for Breece to be productive.

2024.notes: Saquon 2,005 yards all-time season. AJ Brown injury. Smith elite. Hurts SB MVP. Dynasty gold mine.

2025.notes: Saquon dynasty sell high if possible. AJ Brown Trade Rumors & Inconsistency. Goedert scored tons of TD & was productive if scored. Smith ascending. Hurts struggled but produced well in fantasy.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 17th in pass blocking (down 4 spots from 2024) & 12th in run blocking (down 10 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: This will be an above average Unit next year. If fully Healthy it is a top 7 O line.
2026.key_departures: AJ Brown. He is going to be traded to the Patriots in June 2026.
2026.key_adds: Drafted WR Makai Lemon 1st round. Traded for Packers WR Dontayvion Wicks, Signed Hollywood Brown. Drafted TE Eli Stowers (great passing catching TE)
2026.offensive_outlook: The Eagles took a step back in 2025 from their dominant form in 2024. Saquon slowed down some but Patulla was the OC & he actually could not get a D1 team to beat a high school team. AWFUL OC. Ideally, Mannion will get the Eagles offense back to playing at a very high level. Hurts has to play better, plane and simple. This WR room is good enough to support Hurts having and amazaing season & adding Eli Stowers could be a HUGE lift in the long term when Goedert leaves after 2026 season.
2026.dynasty_implications: If the Eagles can get their offense humming again, this is an offense you want to own a lot of players in. They can produce at a very high level for you. Hurts in particular regardless of play will be a top QB because of the tush push.
2026.notes: AJ Brown is going to be traded to the Patriots. He will not be on the team. Devonta Smith is primed to BREAKOUT as a WR1 IF he can maintain target share. Drafted Makai Lemon Round 1, Eli Stowers (great receiving TE who was also scouted as WR). Eagles also traded for Dontayvion Wicks from Packers who is a talented WR but hasn't put it all together yet. Signed Marquiese Brown in free agency who is expected to operate as WR3/4. There are a lot of mouths to feed on this offense and not all of them can be fantasy relevant. Saquon had a rough 2025 season but should be great in 2026 IF Jalen Hurts can improve his level of play. There are a lot of targets available with AJ Brown leaving.

2024.notes: Pickens 1,000+ yards despite QB chaos. Fields dynamic. Najee declining. Freiermuth solid.

2025.notes: Pickens traded to Cowboys & did not play for Steelers in 2025. Steelers traded for DK Metcalf & he had dissapointing season. Opportunity was there but DK struggled to be a weekly WR2. Still potential in Metcalf. Calvin Austin, Roman Wilson, and Thielen were irrelevant for fantasy. Pat Freiermuth had an up and down year, struggling to be fully utilized with Jonnu Smith & Darnell Washington also seeing lots of playing time. Jaylen Warren was a highly productive back & so was Kenneth Gainwell. Both backs had fantastic seasons & were viable in fantasy. Kenneth Gainwell even was playable as flex/RB2.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 1st is pass blocking (up 24 spots from 2024) & 18th in run blocking (up 3 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: O Line should be an above average unit in 2026
2026.key_departures: RB Kenneth Gainwell left in free agency to Bucs. LG Isaac Seumalo left for Cardinals. WR Calvin Austin III left in free agency for Giants. HC Mike Tomlin & OC Arthur Smith (Ass) are both gone.
2026.key_adds: Traded for and Signed Michael Pittman Jr to 3 year $59M deal. Signed RB Rico Dowdle to 2/$12M deal in free agency. Drafted WR Germie Bernard in 2nd round, Drafted OT Max Iheanachor in 1st roud to beef up line. Drafted QB Drew Allar in the 3rd round. Drafted G Gennings Dunker 3rd roud (depth). Bringin in HC Mike McCarthy & Brian Angelichio as OC.
2026.offensive_outlook: Steelers offense struggled in 2025 because their WR room was lacking. Pittsburgh changes that by adding Pittman Jr & Germie Bernard. This is now a highly capable WR room IF Aaron Rodger returns. Rodgers should support solid passing game & Warren & Dowdle could be very productive RB duo.
2026.notes: Drafted Bernard round 2 Steelers traded up. Steelers traded for Michael Pittman Jr. who is aging but will elevate the passing game. DK Metcalf looks to get back on track in 2026 & establish himself as WR1. Crowded WR room. Steelers drafted WR Riley Nowakowski in the 4th round & he will likely operate as WR5 or return specialist. Signed Rico Dowdle to 2 year deal in free agency. Warren is slotted to be 1A and Dowdle 1B, but any injury to either back makes the other a home run hit in fantasy for 2026. Aaron Rodgers SHOULD return to Steelers, but also drafted Drew Allar (bad QB but good prospect who should be rostered because he can progress. Zero floor on Allar but the ceiling is very high if he gets better.)

2024.notes: JSN disappointing sophomore. Metcalf trade rumors. Charbonett & Walker eat into each other fantasy value. Macdonald new HC.

2025.notes: JSN WR1 breakout, top dynasty asset. Sam Darnold fantastic season, low end QB1 option weekly. No mobility so lower floor. Charbonet tore ACL & Kenneth Walker III finished superbowl MVP. DK Metcalf traded & Lockett didnt play in Seattle in 2025. Traded for Shaheed productive deep threat with high ceiling but very low floor. Kupp WAY BEYOND prime. Retiring soon. Tory Horton COULD have upside if he sees playing time increase. Does not heavily utilize TE. Barner fine, Arroyo shows long term potential & very athletic.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 5th in pass protection (up 18 from 2024) & 17th in run blocking (up 12 from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Should be a top 10 O line again in 2026.
2026.key_departures: SuperBowl MVP RB Kenneth Walker III left for Chiefs in free agency. OC Klint Kubiak left to become Raiders HC this offseason.
2026.key_adds: Extended WR Rashid Shaheed on 3 year deal. Signed RB Emmanuel Wilson from Packers in free agency (HIGHLY CAPABLE BACKUP), Drafted RB Jadarian Price in the 1st round from ND.
2026.offensive_outlook: Seahawks were absolutely electric in 2025 & offense flowed through JSN. Expect Darnold to remain a highly productive NFL QB with the offense funneling through JSN, but the run game will need to be established and could be a committee room
2026.dynasty_implications: High powered offense that SHOULD be ok without OC Klint Kubiak (could possibly be a concern). Capable of putting up 40 points any game.
2026.notes: RB Price round 1 RB. with Charbonnet recovering from torn ACL. Lose OC Kubiak to Raiders. JSN top dynasty asset (ELITE). Shaheed could see expanded role in 2026 with full offseason with team. Charbonnet has never truly broken out & torn ACL places concern on productivity when back from injury. Signed RB Emmanuel Wilson in free agency & he could really hurt Price production early (this is a real concern). Cooper Kupp is dust & totally cooked. Tory Horton could be a break out candidate in 2026. Darnold needs to be rostered in all formats & decent low end QB1 with a high powered offense.

2024.notes: CMC injury-plagued. Aiyuk contract holdout. Purdy solid. Kittle aging. Deebo declining. Mason stepped up.

2025.notes: CMC elite performance & played all 17 games. Brock Purdy struggled with injury & Mac Jones filled in proving he can be a starter in the NFL. WR production limited & offense funneled through CMC & Kittle mainly. Jennings high end WR3, Ricky Pearsall struggled to stay healthy all season & did not have a great year. Opportunity to break out later. Kendrick Bourne was productive but inconsistent. Brian Robinson was a back up only. Bandon Aiyuk missed entire season due to ACL tear & relationship with south with 49ers front office. No future with the team. George Kittle torn achilles end of season.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 4th in pass blocking in 2025 (up 14 from 2024) & 8th in run blocking (up 2 from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: 49ers retains LT Trent Williams & this should be a top 7 line in the NFL.
2026.key_departures: WR Brandon Aiyuk (who did not play all of 2025 due to injury) is gone. WR Jauan Jennings is also gone. He has functioned as 49ers WR 1/2 for the past two seasons. RB Brian Robinson Jr left to ATL in free agency.
2026.key_adds: Signed WR Mike Evans from Bucs in free agency. Signed WR Christian Kirk in free agency. Drafted WR De'Zhaun Stribling in the 2nd round from Ole Miss. Drafted RB Kaelon Black in the 3rd round.
2026.offensive_outlook: High powered offense coached by one of the best coaches in the NFL. There will be massive fantasy producers on this team every year. Recently, 49ers WR have not been highly productive or predictable, but with the new signings, there could be some highly valuable WR in this room. CMC is the RB1 overall if healthy (but never a guarantee with him). RB Kaelon Black has received high praises from Kyle Shanahan & he said he was their 2nd RB on their board in the draft.
2026.notes: Stribling round 2 has opportunity to break out early. Mike Evans signing in free agency. Should be alpha WR1 but aging & injury risk. Potential sell high but should produce in 2026.  Drafted RB Kaelon Black round 3 from Indiana. Black was not even invited to the NFL combine, but 49ers LOVE him. Could assume RB2 role immediately if he beats out Jordan James. Ricky Pearsall has an opportunity to break out as a WR2 but needs to stay healthy enough to do so. Signed Christian Kirk in offseason, veteran with no fantasy value but will take away targets. Kittle recovering from torn achilles. Drafted Wills the TE. Tonges should function as primary TE2, Wills will be TE3. CMC is a potential sell high candidate but know if healthy he is the number 1 overall RB in 2026.

2024.notes: Godwin torn achilles again. Evans 1,000 yards again. Irving promising rookie. Mayfield solid.

2025.notes: Evans aging & injured. Godwin struggled to stay healthy. Egbuka rookie 1st round WR amazing first half of season but fell off. Jalen McMillan returned from injury and was solid. Tez Johnson rookie WR was electric on limited opportunities. Bucs struggled to run the ball. Bucky Irving had MAJOR sophomore slump that was caused by shoulder injury and stagnant offense.
