Baker Mayfield looked like MVP candidate but struggled second half of season. Sean Tucker saw major goalline work but nothing else. Rachaad White filled in as lead back when Irving was hurt. Cade Otton productive TE when the ball came his way.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 14th in pass protection (down 12 from 2024) & 26th in run blocking (down 18 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Wirfs struggled with injury in 2025 & line performed poorly. Expect this unit to get back to above average in 2026.
2026.key_departures: WR Mike Evans left to 49ers in free agency after entire career with Bucs. RB Rachaad White left to Commanders in free agency (RB2 and filled in when Irving was injured).
2026.key_adds: RB Kenneth Gainwell signed 2 year deal following IMPRESSIVE season in Pittsburgh as their RB2. Drafted WR Ted Hurst in the 3rd round. Extended TE Cade Otton. Hired new OC Zac Robinson from ATL.
2026.offensive_outlook: Bucs offense struggled in 2025 due to regular injury from Mike Evans, Chris Godwin, Bucky Irving. Baker Mayfield started off the season in the MVP talks & then the offense played so poorly the Bucs missed the playoffs. Expect the Bucs to get back to 2024 form & be a highly productive offense that supports multiple valuable fantasy assets
2026.dynasty_implications: Baker Mayfield is likely the QB of the future for Tampa & they are actively working to extend him. At its peak, it is  a high powered offense that you want to own pieces of. This WR room has a void to fill with the departure of future HOF WR Mike Evans. Godwin is aging, & Egbuka COULD become a true WR1. OR McMillan, Johnson, or Hurst could break out and establish themselves as low end WR2/WR3 types. All of them can't win, but someone will. This RB room is confusing and Tampa has recently run a committee. Unclear if that is because Bucky was hurt in 2025 but he didnt have a single carry inside the 5 yard line the entire season. This makes me think Kenneth Gainwell will see significantly more playing time than many people realize. Sean Tucker MAY end up keeping the goalline role as well. We will find out.
2026.notes: Emeka Egbuka is primed for a MASSIVE breakout if Baker Mayfield has strong 2026 season. Mike Evans left team in free agency for 49ers, opening up opportunity for Jalen McMillan & Tez Johnson & Ted Hurst 3rd round draft pick (young & productive WR). Chris Godwin aging & struggles to produce but could have decent low end WR2/WR3 role over next few years. Bucs signed Kenneth Gainwell in free agency who was HIGHLY productive in Pittsburgh. Strong concern for Bucky Irving owners. We will have to see how the RB split carries. Will get a better idea through the summer and camp. Worth note, if the Bucs do not perform well in 2026, Todd Bowles is going to get fired. Expect his best product or he's done.

2024.notes: Henry gone. Levis mediocre. Ridley disappointing again. Pollard adequate. Full rebuild.

2025.notes: Ward 1.01 franchise QB. Brutal rookie season and little to no fantasy relevance coming out of it. Offense disfunctional. Ridley complete dissapointment & got injured. Elic Ayomanor & Chimere Dike were Cam Ward's favorite targets but were not startable due to poor offense. Tony Pollard was a low end RB2 and high end RB3 some weeks if he scored, but Tyjae Spears ate into his recieving load. Tyjae struggled to stay healthy. Okonkwo was not highly relevant.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 15th in pass blocking (up 13 spots from 2024) & 21st in run blocking (up 9 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: Titans added C Austin Schlottmann from NYG & RG Cordell Volson from Cincinatti. This may end up being an average O line but could easy be below average still.
2026.key_departures: HC Brian Callahan was fired after 1-5 start last season (ass) and this will be a huge help to the Titans offensive success. TE Chig Okonkwo left to Commanders in free agency
2026.key_adds: Titans HUGE adds to coaching staff that could turn this team aroud. HC Robert Saleh & former Giants (and QB whisperer) HC Brian Daboll head head to Tennessee and may a GREAT duo. Bring in WR Wan'Dale Robinson in free agency from NY (1000 yard slot WR last year) & draft WR Carnell Tate 4th overall. Beef up the O line with Austin Schlottmann & Volson. Drafted RB Nicholas Singleton in the 5th round (likely depth).
2026.offensive_outlook: It was a REALLY bad 2025 for the Titans and hopefully Cam Ward is not scarred from it. Titans overhaul WR room bringing in Tate & Robinson who will funcation as Ward's primary Targets. RB room will probably look different in 2027 so don't get too bought in here. Pollard & Spears are likely not the RB of the future for Titans.
2026.dynasty_implications: It is an offense that could slowly be on the rise. It could QUICKLY be on the rise if Ward figures it out early in 2026 and could catch people off guard. Tate & Robinson are our primary targets. Ward is a great potential riser especially in SF. RB room is difficult to project, but Pollard it likely to be lead back in 2026 and could be a low end RB2 in fantasy.
2026.notes: Titans draft Carnell Tate 1.04. Large potential for early breakout & Cam Ward to deliver at a high level. Calvin Ridley is trash but if Cam Ward can sling the rock could produce (we don't want to own Ridley). Ayomanor & Dike COULD be good if Ward produces but with Tate and Robinson around now will never be WR1 on the team. Could gain relevance though. Gunnar Helm entering 2nd year and should operate as TE1. Tony Pollard is aging & only has a few years left (not attractive to own). Tyjae Spears cannot stay healthy. Have to image the Titans will invest in another RB long term (Nicholas Singleton is probably not that guy either).

2024.notes: Daniels electric. McLaurin finally great QB. Noah Brown emerged. Robinson adequate. Luke McCaffrey sleeper.

2025.notes: Daniels srtuggled with injury & so did McLaurin. Disaster season for commanders. Austin Ekeler tore achilles (cooked), & Jacory Croskey-Merritt took over lead back responsibility. Chris Rodriguez Jr functioned as RB2. Deebo Samuel Functioned as WR1 with Terry McLarin only playing 10 games. Marcus Mariota played QB most of season & offense was horrible. Croskey-Merritt did not live up to the hype but the Commanders seem to really like him. Zach Ertz was a productive TE but tore ACL at end of the season. Jaylin Lane & Luke McCaffrey will likely never have real dynasty value. Jayden Daniels WILL BOUNCE BACK & become Elite QB.

2026.oline_2025_stats: 20th in pass blocking (down 6 spots from 2024) & 24th in run blocking (down 15 spots from 2024)
2026.oline_2026_outlook: O line should be similar to 2025 season. Projects as slightly below average line.
2026.key_departures: OC Kluff Kingsbury is gone afer disaster 2025 season (promoted David Blough to OC). Lost WR Deebo Samuel in free agency. Lost TE Zach Ertz due to ACL injury because Marcus Mariota got his knee exploded on a hospital ball across the middle of the field.
2026.key_adds: Signed RB Rachaad White from Tampa in free agency (Jayden Daniels college teammate). Signed WR Ryami Brown in free agency from Jacksonville. Signed TE Chig Okonkwo from Tennessee in free agency to 3 year deal (starter). Drafted RB Kaytron Allen in the 6th roud. Expected to sign WR Brandon Aiyuk in free agency.
2026.offensive_outlook: 2 things were evident in 2025: without Jayden Daniels the Commanders SUCK & the Commanders need their players to step up. Terry McLaurin was hurt most of the season as well & Luke McCaffrey & Jaylin Lane completely failed to step up to the plate. Jayden SHOULD be 100% & if Terry is healthy, that should bring up the rest of the offense in 2026.
2026.dynasty_implications: Terry McLaurin has been struggling with injuries & is aging. The Commanders have young WR talent that can step up, but they are going to need it quickly. Chig Okonkwo could provide immediate help to Jayden Daniels. But Jayden has to play at a high level. I believe Jayden can be a top 5 QB in the NFL & he has not historically struggled with injuries throughout his career. There is a risk in this offense if Jayden gets hurt again, but when healthy, this is an offense that the top RB will be highly relevant, should have a productive TE, and can support fantasy relevance out of multiple WR.
2026.notes: Williams round 3 WR could connect early with Daniels. Terry McLaurin is aging, but if he can stay healthy, he will produce over next few years. Signed TE Chig Okonkwo who could 100% produce well with Jayden Daniels but hadn't provded it with Titans yet. Jacory Croskey-Merritt is set to be 1A RB while they sign Bucs RB Rachaad White in free agency. Could function as 1B and recieving back. Very curious to see how this dynamic turns out. Brandon Aiyuk WILL SIGN with Commanders or be traded to them. Unsure if he will be good following knee surgery, but he will be in Washington next Season. Daniels top 5 SF dynasty QB. Buy him. Rookie WR Williams, WR Dyami Brown, & Treylon Burks all have a chance to operate as WR2 or 3. Only 1 can win the full time job though.
